allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/v1/health" -TimeoutSec 5; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { "Health check failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const prisma = require\('./src/utils/prisma'\); prisma.user.delete\({ where: { username: 'storytest_e2e' } }\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Deleted test user'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "__next_error__|Unhandled Runtime Error|Failed to compile"\) { "COMPILE ERROR DETECTED" } else { "No compile error markers in HTML" } } catch { "Request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\) | Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/v1/health" -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend OK: $\($r.message\)" } catch { "Health check failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const prisma = require\('./src/utils/prisma'\); prisma.user.delete\({ where: { username: 'storytest_text' } }\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Deleted test user'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "__next_error__|Unhandled Runtime Error|Failed to compile"\) { "COMPILE ERROR DETECTED" } else { "No compile error markers" } } catch { "Request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
